channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Micron, Marvell, and Broadcom sink, leading chip stocks lower
item.description: U.S. chipmakers plunged after Broadcom earnings disappointed investors.

item.title: Blackstone restricts flagship fund withdrawals as private asset fears reemerge
item.description: Blackstone capped withdrawals from its $79 billiob BCRED fund after redemption requests rose from 7.9% to 10%, adding to private-market liquidity concerns.

item.title: As the largest World Cup ever kicks off, health officials are focused on more than Ebola
item.description: Officials are more concerned about highly contagious diseases like measles and respiratory viruses, which can spread quickly through large, fast-moving crowds.

item.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
item.description: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

item.title: Soaring stocks created 2 million new millionaires around the world last year
item.description: The population of global millionaires surged 7.9% to 25.3 million in 2025, according to the Capgemini World Wealth Report.

item.title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Broadcom, Netflix, Oracle, Microsoft, CrowdStrike & more
item.description: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
item.description: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

item.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
item.description: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

item.title: Oil prices fall 3% on report Trump reluctant to restart Iran war
item.description: President Donald Trump told aides that he won't resume the war unless U.S. troops are killed, according to The Wall Street Journal.

item.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
item.description: The S&P 500 is headed for a lower open, led by a decline in chip stocks after Broadcom failed to raise guidance enough.

item.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
item.description: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth more than $866 billion.

item.title: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
item.description: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.

item.title: SpaceX IPO hype has traders flocking to this mid-cap stock
item.description: Options volume is picking up in Nasdaq-listed Echostar, a $35-billion networking business based in Colorado that owns an estimated 3% of SpaceX stock.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
item.description: USDA and Texas officials are working to contain New World screwworm from Zavala County, including establishing an infested zone and enforcing quarantine.

item.title: Barclays traders say it's time to buy protection for a tech-led S&P 500 pullback
item.description: The stock market rally could be in trouble here as tech falters, and traders at Barclays think investors should protect themselves.

item.title: Why institutional investors are returning to retail 'in a very big way'
item.description: Investment transaction volumes reached more than $15 billion during the first quarter, an increase of 5% compared with Q1 2025, according to JLL.

item.title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
item.description: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

item.title: Bitcoin's high-conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
item.description: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest-conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin.

item.title: Higher mortgage rates don't just keep buyers on the sidelines. Application denials rise too
item.description: The denial rate in loan applications was 15.1% in 2024, up from 12.2% in 2021, a rise that occurred alongside surging mortgage rates, the St. Louis Fed found.

item.title: Trump's 'big beautiful bill' has a 'double taxation' trap for top earners, tax lawyers say
item.description: A new guide by Congress' tax policy staff indicates that trust income can be taxed twice.

item.title: CrowdStrike is a buy, just not yet. Here's why
item.description: On top of the beat-and-raise, CrowdStrike announced a 4-for-1 stock split. But short-term thinkers sold the stock.

item.title: The Chase Sapphire Reserve's all-time-high 150,000-point bonus is ending soon. Here's why I applied
item.description: The first-year value you get with the Chase Sapphire Reserve's limited-time offer is hard to beat.

item.title: Eli Manning's private equity firm acquires licensing company for NFL Flag in bet on youth sports
item.description: Eli Manning's Brand Velocity Group announced a deal to acquire youth sports company RCX amid congressional bill to ban private equity from youth sports.

item.title: Tire giant Pirelli vows legal action as short seller alleges ‘close relationship’ with Russia
item.description: Pirelli has instructed lawyers to take legal action after short seller Grizzly Research claimed the firm has a "close relationship" with Russia.

item.title: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
item.description: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

item.title: CrowdStrike narrowly beats estimates on AI tailwinds, but stock falls 10%
item.description: CrowdStrike shares have rallied nearly 60% this year on skyrocketing demand for cybersecurity in the age of advanced artificial intelligence.

item.title: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
item.description: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.

item.title: Hidden beneath AI chips, Chinese-made circuit boards raise national security concerns in U.S.
item.description: With demand booming for printed circuit boards, the U.S. government is trying to boost domestic production to move away from reliance on China.

item.title: Senate GOP strips up to $1B for Trump ballroom security from immigration enforcement bill
item.description: GOP leaders reportedly privately concluded that the funding proposal risked derailing the broader immigration bill, both politically and procedurally.

item.title: As Honeywell Aerospace readies for its stand-alone debut, its CEO is forecasting big growth
item.description: By 2030 Honeywell is targeting annual earnings of at least $6.5 billion and full-year free cash flow of at least $4 billion.
